title: Difficult speaking solutions: 9 herbal creams for deaf or hard of hearing
description: Melissa officinalis creams are a natural remedy for difficult speaking. The creams contain properties like linalool and geraniol, which are known to have a calming effect on the nervous system. This can help to soothe the vocal cords and reduce inflammation, making it easier to speak clearly. The constituents, including essential oils and plant extracts, work together to reduce anxiety and stress, which can contribute to stuttering or stammering.
